message.content:
The two plan cards have distinct visual states:  

1. **Left Card ("ESSAI GRATUIT")**:  
   - Has a green dot (status indicator) and an orange button ("Commencer l’essai gratuit").  
   - Features grayed - out (inactive) checkmarks for some features (e.g., “Domaine personnalisé”, “Logo Boutiko affiché”).  

2. **Right Card ("PRO - Recommandé")**:  
   - Has an orange “Recommandé” badge at the top, yellow stars, and a white button (“Passer Pro maintenant”).  
   - All features have green checkmarks (active).  


The **right card (“PRO - Recommandé”)** appears selected. Clear visual differences include:  
- The “Recommandé” badge (orange, top - right of the right card) vs. no badge on the left.  
- The button color (orange on the left, white on the right).  
- Feature checkmark colors (green on the right, gray on the left for some features).  
- The presence of yellow stars on the right card (absent on the left).
